settings.title: The Bespoke Process
settings.description:
There’s nothing quite like allowing your imagination to take the lead, and watching a piece of jewellery come to life from conception to first wear.

We pride ourselves on the intimate approach we take towards custom craftsmanship, and this preliminary connection allows us to piece together the top-line details of your project and assign you the perfect Bespoke Designer.

Email Us to Enquire
settings.feature_text: Craftsmanship and originality are at the forefront of our design ethos, with all pieces handcrafted with love to stand the test of time

settings.title: Initial Conversation
settings.description:
The initial conversation can take place via email, phone call or in-store, and we’ll use this time to answer as many questions as
we can to ensure the journey is smooth sailing for you. If requested, we’ll endeavour to provide ballpark cost estimations at this stage, however this can be specific stone-dependant (which are selected later down the track) so these estimations are always broad in their scope.

settings.title: Design Consultation
settings.description:
This is where your appointed Bespoke Designer will work through the process of designing your piece, seeking to create something personal and unique. You’ll work closely with your Designer (predominantly
via email) throughout this stage, but further in-store or virtual appointments are always available if necessary.

settings.title: Stone Sourcing
settings.description:
Based on the design we have finalised, our team will now ideally source several options for the perfect stone for your custom piece. At this stage, your Designer will also provide accurate quotes for the approved design with each proposed stone. We will present these stones to you in person or through email via HD videos and imagery.

This sourcing stage continues for as long as it takes us to find your perfect stone – in some cases this will occur almost immediately, or take longer in the case of rare or very specific stones. Above all, we are committed to finding the perfect fit for your precious piece.

settings.title: Finalisation of Design & Stone
settings.description:
Once we have sourced the perfect
stone and finalised the design, this is secured with a 50-75 per cent deposit. At this stage, we (Bespoke Customer Service) take over, and send over a deposit
invoice and document to sign which outlines our terms and conditions.

settings.title: Confirmation & Production
settings.description:
Upon receipt of your deposit and signed terms and conditions, your dream piece will be scheduled for production. 

Each of our bespoke pieces is crafted here in Sydney by our master jewellers, with the production process taking between 4 - 5 weeks to complete. To note: if you have a specific date in mind that you would like your piece finalised by, please flag this at the beginning of the process. 

For those creating engagement pieces, we always recommend waiting to receive your finished ring before booking any special
plans for proposals. The nature of handmade jewellery means there is always the possibility that something last-minute could delay delivery. We will be in touch every few weeks throughout this waiting period to let you know how your piece is progressing and to answer any questions you may have.

settings.title: Completion
settings.description: Once your piece is complete, we will be in touch with an image and to request balance payment and delivery instructions. Your Bespoke Designer will be in touch to make sure you are in love with your piece, and to follow up with any specific care instructions.

settings.title: Bespoke Archive
settings.description: Browse, feel inspired and fall in love. Here, we offer a glimpse inside our curated archive of bespoke designs. Though these particular pieces are not for sale, we hope they serve as a foundation for inspiration when approaching your own unique bespoke creation.

settings.title: Client Stories
settings.description: We would be nothing without the support of our passionate, unique community. Their personal stories - the reasons our customers buy from us - shape the essence of our brand.
